ab: Niqan su diyax ka isu saya hu?
ch: M:你今天有空嘛?
en: Are you available today?

ab: Hmuya pa?
ch: W:怎麼了?
en: What is the matter?

ab: Smatang ku musa ming sunan.
ch: M:我想去拜訪你。
en: I would like to visit you.

ab: Niqan ddaun mu ka saya uka ku sapah. Babaw da haw!
ch: W:我今天有事不在家。改天吧！
en: I am out today. How about another day?

ab: So kiya u niqan su diyax ka kusun pa? Yahun misu ming banaw cka hidaw kusun.
ch: M:那你明天有空嗎?我下午去找你。
en: Then, are you available tomorrow? I’ll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

ab: Malu, twaun misu sapah.
ch: W:可以，我在家等你。
en: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

ab: Malu ku smku hnang su hu? Yuxun mu mbahang mi matas.
ch: M:請問我可以錄音嗎?我想做紀錄。
en: Would you mind if  I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

ab: Malu wah! Ini huya.
ch: W:好啊!沒有問題。
en: Sure! No problem.

ab: Malu psueyga hu?
ch: M:可以錄影嗎?
en: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

ab: Ini ku so mndungus qtan, ini ndwani kmaraw ka soko uri, iya ta haw!
ch: W:我不好看，倉庫也沒整理，我們不要啦!
en: No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn’t been tidied up yet.

ab: So kiya daw psasing ku da malu da.
ch: M:那我拍照就好。
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: Iya psasing uri.
ch: W:拍照也不要。
en: No photographing either.

ab: Mhuway su balay! Smruwa su yaku muda msiling kari sunan.
ch: M:謝謝您! 願意讓我訪問您。
en: Thank you for accepting the interview.

ab: Ini huya, iyux su mpsiling manu?
ch: W:沒問題，你想問什麼?
en: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

ab: Risaw su cida han pa manu ka qpahun su?
ch: M:請問您年輕時是做什麼的?
en: What do you do when you are young?

ab: Keysacu ku cuxal ka yaku han, binaw wada ku msangay qpahun ni ka saya da.
ch: W:我以前是警察，但我現在退休了。
en: I was a police officer but I am retired now.

ab: So kiya u wa su qmpah ka saya na hu?
ch: M:那你現在有工作嗎?
en: Then, are you working at the moment?

ab: Wa ku qmpah sapah pyasan ka saya.
ch: W:我在學校上班。
en: I am working at school.

ab: Wa mniq alang ka llaqi su uri hu?
ch: M:請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎?
en: Do your kids live in the tribe too?

ab: Ini, wa mniq alang mkbrnux kana ka llaqi mu.
ch: W:不，我的孩子在都市居住。
en: No, my kids are all living in the city.

ab: So kiya daw murux su nanaq mniq sapah hu?
ch: M:那你自己一個人住嗎?
en: Then, do you live by yourself?

ab: Tmabu ku kingal huling mi kingal qduda uri na, tnsapah mu ka dhiya uri.
ch: W:我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
en: I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

ab: Tmabu ku kingal ngiyaw uri na, niqan tnbuwan ka thiqan pa ini ksdamac.
ch: M:我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴不會無聊。
en: I have a cat too. I won’t get bored with the company of my pet.

ab: Iyux ku mpsiling sunan quri waya pndakar umaduk.
ch: M:我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌。
en: I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

ab: Ini knou ka knkla mu, binaw klaun mu duma u cyukun misu kana.
ch: W:我知道的不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
en: I don’t know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

ab: Qqiya ddiyun namu umaduk pa niqan manu ka pnwaya namu hu?
ch: M:你們打獵的武器有什麼禁忌嗎?
en: Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

ab: Qqiya ddiyun nami umaduk pa naqah tlengun qridin.
ch: W:我們打獵的武器不可以讓女性碰到。
en: Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

ab: So kiya u malu msupu musa umaduk ka qridin hu?
ch: M:那女人可以一起去打獵嗎?
en: Then, can women go hunting together?

ab: Naqah! Naqah musa umaduk ka qridin uri.
ch: W:不行，女人也不可以打獵。
en: No, women cannot go hunting either.
